interface FastEthernet0/0
 description Uplink to Core
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 ip ospf authentication-key 7 0822455D0A16
 ip ospf message-digest-key 1 md5 7 0822455D0A161C4B
 clockrate 64000
 fair-queue individual-limit
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 description Management
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
 standby 1 ip 192.168.1.254
 standby 1 authentication cisco
!
interface Serial0/0
 ip address 172.16.0.1 255.255.255.252
 ppp pap sent-username remote password 7 0822455D0A16
!
router ospf 1
 router-id 1.1.1.1
 network 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
!
router bgp 65000
 bgp log-neighbor-changes
 neighbor 10.0.0.2 remote-as 65001
 neighbor 10.0.0.2 password 7 0822455D0A161C4B
!
ip ftp password ftp123
ip ftp username ftpuser
!
ip domain-lookup
!
line con 0
 password conpass
line aux 0
 password auxpass
line vty 0 4
 password vtypass
 transport input ssh
!
ntp clock-period 17179869
ntp server 10.0.0.100
!
snmp-server community public RO
snmp-server community private RW
snmp-server host 10.0.0.50 traps public

crypto isakmp policy 10
 encr aes
 authentication pre-share

crypto isakmp key MyIsakmpKey2 address 10.0.0.3
